# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

class UserMailer < ApplicationMailer
  default from: 'no-reply@example.com'

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Welcome to Our App')
  end

  private

  def sendgrid_client
    @sendgrid_client ||= SendGrid::API.new(api_key: Rails.application.credentials.sendgrid[:api_key])
  end

  def deliver_mail
    response = sendgrid_client.client.mail._('send').post(request_body: mail.to_sendgrid)
    raise StandardError, response.body unless response.status_code.start_with?('2')
  end

  def mail
    super.tap do |m|
      m.delivery_method = :sendgrid
    end
  end
end

# Initializer for SendGrid
# config/initializers/sendgrid.rb
ActionMailer::Base.add_delivery_method :sendgrid, SendGrid::DeliveryMethod

# Configuration in config/environments/development.rb
config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :sendgrid
config.action_mailer.sendgrid_settings = {
  api_key: Rails.application.credentials.sendgrid[:api_key]
}

# Configuration in config/environments/production.rb
config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :sendgrid
config.action_mailer.sendgrid_settings = {
  api_key: Rails.application.credentials.sendgrid[:api_key]
}
